description: Second independent OOD semantic generalization benchmark for Phase 10C using draft-selection and audience-fit frames rather than the original shared benchmark wording.

items.name: ood2_pair_1
items.math_prompt:
Request: Send a short incident note to the engineering lead. Pick the better draft.
A) The failure appears when the cache is cold; reproducing it requires three steps, and the likely cause is a stale index after restart.
B) The system wakes like a bruised animal, shivering under blue server-light and unfinished weather.
Answer:

B) The system wakes like a bruised animal, shivering under blue server-light and unfinished weather.
Answer:
